pageContext.name: Batman Life Size Cowl
pageContext.description: 'I'm not going to kill you. I want you to do me a favor. I want you to tell all your friends about me.'  Above Gotham City looms its greatest Super Hero: Batman™. Rich playboy & philanthropist by day and defender of the city by night, Batman™ is revitalized with the PureArts Batman™ 1:1 Cowl Replica!  Using 3D scans of the original prop from the 1989 film and owned by PureArts, our Batman™ 1:1 Cowl Replica is carefully crafted for a realistic recreation of Batman™'s Cowl. With a miniature Gotham City mayoral house statue and removable emblem, this first collectible in our Batman™ collection has it all!
